global_context.scene_description: Exterior daytime photograph of a Phoenix-area residential driveway in front of a stucco single-story home with a tile roof. A landscaped yard of desert rock, small cacti, and one mature palm tree is visible. An HVAC service van is parked in the driveway. The van is white with bold black and red graphics on the side reading 'ASH COOLING & HEATING' and below that in smaller text 'VETERAN OWNED — ROC #356015'. The side door of the van is open, and an HVAC technician — a fit adult male in his 30s-40s wearing a navy polo with a small ASH logo embroidered on the chest, dark work pants, and work boots — is stepping down from the van onto the driveway. He is holding a clipboard in his right hand. On the clipboard, a printed HVAC quote is clearly visible with a bold red marker circle around the price and handwritten red text '$14,500' crossed out, with 'BEAT BY $4,200' written next to it in red marker. In the open van doorway behind him, military dog tags are hanging from the rearview mirror, visible in the frame. A small Trane dealer decal is visible on the van's front windshield. The van license plate is Arizona-standard. Harsh midday Arizona sunlight creates crisp shadows. The tech is mid-stride, walking toward the viewer — body oriented slightly toward the camera, purposeful posture, confident but not posed. Sky above is clear, bright blue. Across the top 15% of the frame, bold white sans-serif headline text on a slim dark navy bar reads 'SEND US YOUR QUOTE. WE'LL SHOW UP AND BEAT IT.' Across the bottom 12%, a solid red rectangular banner contains bold white sans-serif text 'BEAT MY QUOTE →' on the left and the ASH Cooling & Heating logo on the right.

composition.focal_point: The technician stepping down from the van with the marked-up quote on his clipboard
composition.notes: Reserve top 15% for headline bar. Reserve bottom 12% for red CTA banner. Tech + van occupy middle 73%.
